assessment.note: He names some independent judgment, but 'over-index on being safe' signals mild underreach in initiative and stretch.

new_queue.label: Safe calls
new_queue.name: You said 'safe' — where did you hold back when you could have pushed harder?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific moment where caution limited Principal-level impact.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Expectation alignment
new_queue.name: When a cross-team dependency is shaky, how do you set expectations early?
new_queue.description: Tests whether he is proactively shaping alignment before issues harden.

new_queue.label: Tradeoff calls
new_queue.name: Where are you making the tradeoff call yourself instead of pushing it up?
new_queue.description: Looks for Principal-level judgment in ambiguous situations rather than safe execution.

new_queue.label: Next commitment
new_queue.name: What is the first concrete change you want to make before our next review?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific behavioral commitment with a near-term horizon.
